calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq. Two Weeks Before The Hearing Date.
Off Calendar Jun-15-2026 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq. Two Weeks Before The Hearing Date.
Off Calendar Dec-03-2025 Continued To Jun-15-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Jon Vaught appeared via zoom for Darren Wallace (administrator).

Mr. Vaught stated that the decedent Had a 50% interest in the business and 50% interest in the building that he owned with his business partner, that he also owned a condominium in San Francisco, that he holds zoom meetings every month with the heirs in England, and that the heirs are not opposed to selling the condominium.

The matter is continued to June 15, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq. Two Weeks Before The Hearing Date.
Off Calendar Nov-03-2025 Continued To Dec-03-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-05-2025 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-26-2025 Continued To May-05-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-27-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated January 16, 2023 is admitted to probate. Darren Wallace is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with will annexed with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for January 27, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-26-2023 Granted Per Written Order
